---
title: 'SC306 Homework #2'
author: "Othar Zaldastani II"
date: "February 20, 2026"
output: pdf_document
---
## Question 1
Generate 1000 standard normal values and a histogram of values greater than or less than 1.5.
```{r}
thou.vals = rnorm(1000, mean=0, sd=1)
vals_1.5 <- thou.vals[ abs(thou.vals) > 1.5 ]
hist(vals_1.5, breaks = 15, main = "Histogram of Values Greater or Less Than 1.5", xlim = c(-4, 4))
```

## Question 2
199 value vector.
```{r}
# I know there's a better way to do this, but not quite sure how to execute it properly.
vector.1_100 = abs(abs((-99:99)) - 100)

length(vector.1_100)
```

```{r}
vector.1_100
```

## Question 3

`USArrests` dataset analysis.
```{r}
library(datasets)

sorted.arrests = order(USArrests$Murder, decreasing = T)

View(sorted.arrests)
```
